sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ke’n tu’n bangmah in sim nawn keng

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka deih bel teng khat zong siit lo,
Ama’ si khekna in ka nei.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: En ven, a lu a khut, akhe,
Dahna, itna hong luang suk khawm;
Na mu ngei maw linglukhu le,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tamlua ka ci ngei kei ding hi;
A hong itna ke’n ngaihsun leng,’
Ka pum ka tak ka pia nuam hi.
